---
title: "Courses, lectures, workshops"
---

Here are links to teaching resources for various lectures or workshops: slides, RMarkdown or Quarto source files, scripts, exercises.

**Note:** This page is a work-in-progress. I'm currently going through my teaching archive and uploading or linking relevant information here. If a resource you'd like to see is missing, please get in touch! Thanks for understanding.

## 2024

### **"Archaic human introgression"**

Lecture for the *Population genetics* course at the University of Copenhagen, February 28, 2024

-   [slides]() (PDF download)
-   [exercises and scripts](https://github.com/bodkan/ku-introgression2024) (GitHub)
